items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm whether the scenario behavior for 'GPS-based arrival confirmation' is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include specific details or outcomes related to the GPS functionality, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or results from the simulation of the persona scenario, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is met.
